ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., btc, eth) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was launched */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "current_supply" TEXT /* Current circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links (e.g., Twitter, Reddit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Current market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Current trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change over the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage price change over the last 24 hours */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was recorded */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency in the last 24 hours */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency at the start of the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency at the end of the day */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "market_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., Binance, Coinbase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading decision */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Trading decision (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the trading decision */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading decision was made */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trading decision (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "technical_indicator" TEXT /* Technical indicator used to make the decision (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Current market trend (e.g., bullish, bearish, sideways) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_decisions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency held */,
  "investment" REAL /* Total investment in the cryptocurrency */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Average purchase price of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the portfolio */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was recorded */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., ROI, Annualized Return) */,
  "performance_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the performance is calculated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES user_portfolio ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency at the time of trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "signal" TEXT /* Trading signal (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was generated */,
  "signal_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trading signal (e.g., strong, moderate, weak) */,
  "signal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for generating the trading signal */,
  "signal_source" TEXT /* Source of the trading signal (e.g., technical analysis, news event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
